svg.text: Current-state view of how it works — no status markers. Medium: committed SVG under docs/design/ (kind: concept).
Legend: pill "loop-bar" = repeatable without an argument (/loop) · "1× one-time" = Bootstrap · dashed arrow = skill-in-skill (calls / delegates) · diamond = human gate
Iteration loop — per idea · roadmap seeds 1..n phases · plan plans 1..n milestones
Foundation edits (vision · constitution · architecture — e.g. React→Vue): drafted in roadmap/plan, ratified at the spec-acceptance gate — NEVER in implement.
Durable state: GitHub issues · milestones · project board · PRs — no local DB/JSON/daemon
C · Roadmap sparring loop (with design + prior art)
quick web search · deep research · none
(+ design SVG, if worth drawing) — durable
· roadmap & plan = multi-milestone loops (1..n per run).
· Exactly two human gates: spec-acceptance · milestone-QA.
· Foundation edits: in planning, ratified at the gate, never in implement.
· Design = part of the sparring, in sync with planning (UI + non-UI).
· Design trigger: "a visualisation clarifies the decision" — optional.
· Medium-agnostic in the constitution; the project chooses in docs/design.md.
· loopkit medium: committed SVG (renders in file/rich view, not the raw diff).
· inception settles the design surface + medium (Step 7b · UI or concept).
· Proportional ceremony: full-spec / living-spec / track:adhoc — one per change.
· Durable state = GitHub only — no local DB/JSON/daemon; subscription auth.
Every artifact is downstream of research —
· each spec — prior decisions + decision log
· design — "how did others solve X" → variants
Committed SVG — inline attributes, no script/foreignObject; renders in GitHub's file/rich view. loopkit's docs/design.md medium (kind: concept).
